query:
at the same time, I'm working on 413 and they have open qeustions: Open questions needing your input before design proceeds:           
  
  1. mean_entry_degree direction — in+out (2× per edge, undirected    
  view) or out-degree only? Proposed: in+out for better connectivity
  picture.                                                            
  2. Connectivity of bootstrap-only entries — should an entry     
  connected only via bootstrap_only=1 edges count as connected or     
  isolated? Proposed: isolated (exclude bootstrap edges from all
  metrics, matching TypedRelationGraph.inner).                        
  3. Format placement — graph cohesion as a sub-section of existing
  Coherence block, or standalone "Graph Topology" section? Proposed:  
  Coherence sub-section.
  4. Computation timing — one async SQL call per context_status       
  invocation (fast aggregate), or cache in the background tick?       
  Proposed: per-call (diagnostic only, not operational).

entries.title: ADR-002 col-029: Two SQL Queries for Graph Cohesion Metrics
SQL pseudocode with JOIN-heavy queries must be traced against explicit scenarios before Gate 3a approval
co_access promotion SELECT missing quarantine-status filter causes compaction/promotion oscillation
Co-access promotion tick: quarantine JOIN required on both endpoints and in max_count subquery
